subject: I’d like to introduce myself, Peter

body:
The election is coming up FAST. Get your input in now. |
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37147047:WtwqO8boN:m:1:1155937413:32CB308625C915DC1BBA6309D2390F0F:r)

Peter,

I am proud to join the team as Mr. Trump's new campaign manager.

Yesterday I asked him to give me a list of our strongest supporters.

Your name showed up on the list as a Big League supporter.

Which is why I'm asking for your valuable input on the state of the race and the issues you care about.

[**Please complete the Platform for America Survey today.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37147047:WtwqO8boN:m:1:1155937413:32CB308625C915DC1BBA6309D2390F0F:r)

You've probably received a few surveys from us over the past month already. These surveys play a crucial role in helping us shape our message and ensuring we're on track to WIN.

But we still have a lot to do, and little time to do it.

We have 78 days to:
* Broaden our support and win over the hearts of undecided voters
* Fight back against Hillary's slanderous attacks with ads of our own
* Execute a massive, nationwide grassroots ground game

**Your honest, critical feedback helps us keep our campaign on message -- and ensures it 's resonating with the American people.**

[**Take the Survey Now >>**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37147047:WtwqO8boN:m:1:1155937413:32CB308625C915DC1BBA6309D2390F0F:r)

I don't have to tell you -- the mainstream media is always going to try to distort our message.

But my job is to help cut through the media's noise and get our message straight to the voter.

To successfully do that, I need your help. I need to know where you stand on a variety of issues facing our country.

Between now and November 8, every single day counts.

[**Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37147047:WtwqO8boN:m:1:1155937413:32CB308625C915DC1BBA6309D2390F0F:r)

Thank you, Peter. I look forward to reading your responses,

Kellyanne Conway
Campaign Manager
Donald Trump for President

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Trump’s new ads
body:
We need to be ready. | Peter --

We knew it was coming. Now we know what it looks like.

Donald Trump's very first attack ad is currently running in Florida, Ohio, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania, and it is a piece of work.

The very first line insinuates the election will be rigged -- and then it spirals downward from there. Nearly every moment contains something that isn’t true.

Trump is putting $5 million behind this buy. [**So we need to be ready with a response, Peter.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyOTg4MDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNzExNjE4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

These ads will run through the end of the month -- at which point, the next wave of attacks will surely begin.

We have to answer before Trump commits more of his war chest.

But right now, responding to his attack is tougher than I want to admit. Because our August fundraising has been lagging behind, we’re going to have to make some choices and set aside some of the things we were hoping to prioritize.

**So knowing what we face, I’m asking for your help. Can you chip in right now? We’ll send you a free sticker with any donation:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyOTg4MDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNzExNjE4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

Which is why I want your hand in crafting an actionable plan to defeat her. Please take the Stop Hillary Survey now. >> We need to challenge Hillary on the core issues and expose her corruption to the American people. name: Team Cole
subject: BILL COLE UNVEILS DRUG PLAN, TRAVELS STATE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --
Last week was a busy week for the Cole for Governor campaign. On Tuesday, Bill Cole welcomed former Florida Governor Jeb Bush to Morgantown where they toured Mon General Hospital. After that, Bill Cole [unveiled](http://www.billcolewv.com/cole_unveils_drug_plan?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=1) his 7 _-Point Action Plan to Combat West Virginia’s Drug Epidemic_ during a speech to the West Virginia Business and Industry Council. Right after that Governor Bush was the special guest at a very successful fundraiser. The next day Bill traveled to Huntington to [meet](http://www.billcolewv.com/cole_met_with_huntington_drug_policy_task_force?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=2) with Mayor Steve Williams’ Drug Policy Task Force where he was [briefed](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.herald-dispatch.com%2Fnews%2Fcole-unveils-plan-to-fight-drug-epidemic%2Farticle_011d9df1-c8a0-5e8e-8c22-8c6ea6d0f18f.html&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=3) on the 28 overdoses, with 1 death, on Monday. That evening it was a packed house at Bar 101 in downtown Charleston for the Young Professional fundraiser.

On Thursday Bill Cole visited the state fair with Congressman Evan Jenkins. He participated in _WVNS_ ’ Stump Speech event where all four candidates for Governor were confirmed to attend. Jim Justice cancelled at the last minute because he either can’t or won’t campaign. The fair is less than 10 miles from his house.
On Saturday, Bill Cole and a team of volunteers WALKED in the Parkersburg Homecoming Parade where the theme of the event was _West Virginia Strong_ which mirrors the Cole campaign motto _West Virginia Proud West Virginia Strong_.

The campaign also started airing its new TV ad addressing the drug epidemic called [_Fair Warning_](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D6yaLlOVbtzQ&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=4). To help keep the ad on the air please [chip-in](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=5) whatever you can –even $5 – today. Yesterday, Bill Cole’s plan of action to deal with the drug epidemic [won praise](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theintelligencer.net%2Fopinion%2Feditorials%2F2016%2F08%2Fbattling-abuse-a-team-effort%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=6) from _The Intelligencer_. Yesterday and today, Bill is off the campaign trail as the legislature is holding Interim Session in Charleston. But, on Tuesday through the end of the week, it will be another busy set of days with lots of events including another trip to Parkersburg. **TEAM COLE

** P.S. Some of Justice’s biggest liberal backers in Washington have started airing a negative, false TV ad against Bill Cole because they are worried that Justice’s support of Hillary Clinton will hurt him. You can get the facts on the ad [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/justice_allies_launch_false_negative_attack_on_cole?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=7). And, to help us fight back please consider [donating](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_aug_21&n=8) now. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tim=20Smith?=
subject: Eric Greitens Saved My Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Democrats Attack Greitens Days Before Missouri GOP Primary

By Maggie Severns, POLITICO
7/28/2016 5:17 PM EST

A political group affiliated with the Democratic Governors Association is reserving ad time to attack GOP gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri, seeking to affect the race just five days before Republicans choose their nominee from a crowded field.

Two sources tracking media spending in the state said that Jobs and Opportunity, a 527 group funded by the DGA, has booked about a half-million dollars in broadcast TV and additional radio spending attacking Greitens. The DGA did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

The ad is set to start airing Friday. Audio, which a source said was from the ad, criticizes Greitens for accepting money from a donor accused of sexually abusing a woman.

"What does this victim accused of human trafficking have to do with your vote for governor? Well a man accused of abusing her for 13 years gave Eric Greitens $1 million," a narrator says in the ad. "While others returned his money, Greitens said he was honored to take it."

Greitens, a former Navy SEAL and political newcomer, has been picking up steam in the competitive GOP primary because of his charisma and status as an outsider. The ad is a clear indication that Democrats would rather not face Greitens in the general election. Polls have found the race between Greitens and the three other candidates extremely close, but a SurveyUSA poll released this week did find Greitens leading the pack with 25 percent, with opponent John Brunner behind him at 21 percent.

Missouri was the site of a notorious instance of Democratic primary meddling four years ago, when Democratic Sen. Claire McCaskill's campaign aired ads casting GOP Rep. Todd Akin as conservative before his Senate primary. Akin won the three-way Republican race and promptly imploded in the general election, losing to McCaskill by more than 15 percentage points.

The DGA tried to influence Republicans' gubernatorial primary in Colorado in 2014, funding a group that tried to boost conservative ex-Rep. Tom Tancredo. But the effort prompted a backlash and Tancredo ultimately lost the GOP primary.

The winner in the Missouri GOP primary will face current Attorney General Chris Koster, a moderate and rising star in the Democratic Party, in the general election.

Chip in now to help us fight back (https://donate.ericgreitens.com)

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=5d53ca56e8) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer) with us!

Friend -- What's the world's greatest deliberative body (the U.S. Senate) known for? Well, under Mitch McConnell, it's obstruction and partisanship. Want more of that? We're thrilled to announce that the Political Action Committee of the Indiana Fraternal Order of Police, citing John and Christina's commitment to public safety, has officially endorsed this campaign.

Peter, For too long, too many Hoosiers have lived in fear of crime, violence, and drug addiction in our communities. John Gregg and Christina Hale believe that Hoosiers deserve better. That's why they've made crime prevention a top priority in this campaign. Today, we're thrilled to announce that the Political Action Committee of the Indiana Fraternal Order of Police, citing John and Christina's commitment to public safety, has officially endorsed this campaign. **[If you're committed to making Indiana safer for all Hoosiers, will you chip in $5 to help John continue the fight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/1348360356955031552/6788473351200704512?utm_campaign=fnd_fopend_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160822_fnd_gq_fopend_ndn__gc&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1348360356955031552/6788473351200704512?utm_campaign=fnd_fopend_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160822_fnd_gq_fopend_ndn__gc&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=) This endorsement is a big deal -- and a huge honor. The Indiana Fraternal Order of Police (F.O.P.) represents over 14,000 law enforcement officers and their families across the state -- men and women who put their lives on the line to keep Hoosiers safe every day. So you know that the media and voters were listening when Bill Owensby, president of the Indiana F.O.P. told the media that "the law enforcement community, as well as the citizens of this fine state, will have a strong advocate for public safety" in John. John and Christina are looking forward to working with the proud members of the Indiana F.O.P. to ensure all Hoosiers are safe in their homes, their schools, where they work and throughout their entire communities. But first, they need to continue building the momentum to win in November. **[Will you help keep the momentum going by chipping in $5 or more to help John Gregg and Christina Hale fight for Hoosier families?](https://act.myngp.com/el/1348360356955031552/6788473351200704512?utm_campaign=fnd_fopend_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160822_fnd_gq_fopend_ndn__gc&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for your support, Team Gregg

Patrick has always stood up for women's health. This is a critical victory, but we know this fight isn't over. [**Will you add your name to stand against Rick Scott and his anti-woman efforts?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d45/738133e4/308c114c/7f8516b6/86846610/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160822/?subsource=ngpattre160822")
